title: GEAS Deliberation Record
description: Structured multi-party judgment over a proposal. Used at both task level and mission level; the level is inferred from storage path (under tasks/{task_id}/deliberations/ for task-level, under missions/{mission_id}/deliberations/ for mission-level).

subject_id.description: task_id for task-level deliberation; mission_id for mission-level deliberation. Level is determined by storage path, not by this field.

proposal_summary.description: Short summary of the question under deliberation.

participants.description: Agent types participating in the deliberation.

severity.description: Required when the participant records a materially negative or blocking position.

result.description: Outcome of the deliberation. 'inconclusive' means quorum was not met.

quorum_failure_count.description: Consecutive quorum failures tracked by the implementation.
